title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.155 - Disclaimer as to nonhealth services corporations
text:
354.155.  Disclaimer as to nonhealth services corporations. — Nothing contained in sections 354.010 to 354.380 shall affect the right to organize a corporation under chapter 352 or chapter 355 or the powers or rights of corporations organized pursuant thereto which are not health services corporations.
(L. 1973 S.B. 3 § 30, A.L. 1983 H.B. 127)
